Tips for Better AI Replies
✓

Be Specific

Include specific details from the review in your response

✓

Stay Professional

Maintain a courteous tone even with negative reviews

✓

Thank Customers

Always thank customers for taking time to leave feedback

✓

Take Action

Mention any steps you're taking to address concerns
